# Generator Notes

The `.g.dart` files in this package are generated by the `generators` package at `dev_packages/generators` using `build_runner`.

To regenerate all `.g.dart` files:

```bash
cd zikzak_inappwebview_platform_interface
dart run build_runner build --delete-conflicting-outputs
```

## Hand-edits to generated files

The generator does not produce null-safe `fromMap` code for non-nullable fields.
When `map['field']` returns `null` and the field is declared as a non-nullable
type (e.g. `String message`), the generated code crashes with
`type 'Null' is not a subtype of type 'String'`.

The following `.g.dart` files have manual null-safety fixes that **must be
re-applied after regeneration**:

### `lib/src/types/console_message.g.dart`

The `fromMap` method fixes the `message` and `messageLevel` fields:

```dart
// Before (generated — crashes when map values are null):
instance.message = map['message'];
instance.messageLevel = ConsoleMessageLevel.fromNativeValue(
  map['messageLevel'],
)!;

// After (hand-fixed — null-safe):
instance.message = (map['message'] as String?) ?? '';
instance.messageLevel =
    ConsoleMessageLevel.fromNativeValue(map['messageLevel']) ??
    ConsoleMessageLevel.LOG;
```
